3A_Bibliographic.citation: Garavan, H., et al. (2024). Responsible use of population neuroscience data: Towards standards of accountability and integrity. Developmental Cognitive Neuroscience, 70, 101466.
3A_Bibliographic.notes: This is an EDITORIAL, not an empirical study. It does not contain screen time/social media data or effect sizes. It discusses responsible data use in ABCD broadly.

3I_Rhetorical_Moves.discussion_characterization: This is an editorial about responsible use of ABCD data, not an empirical study on screen time/social media. It addresses data misuse, health equity, and inclusivity concerns. It does not report any screen time or social media analyses.
3I_Rhetorical_Moves.ambiguity_notes: Paper is clearly an editorial, not an empirical study. Should be flagged for exclusion from the systematic review.
